name: El Pollo Loco (Pollo Asada)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the white wine vinegar, olive oil, white wine, oregano, thyme, salt, minced garlic, and hot sauce.
2. Place two whole chicken breasts in the marinade, ensuring they are fully coated.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for several hours, preferably overnight, to allow the flavors to develop.
4. When ready to cook, grill the marinated chicken over low heat until thoroughly cooked through. This should take about 8-10 minutes per side, depending on the thickness of the chicken breasts.
5. Remove the chicken from the marinade and discard any remaining liquid.
